tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsMfaEnrollmentFinalize
tools.description: Finishes enrolling a second factor for the user.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsMfaEnrollmentStart
tools.description: Step one of the MFA enrollment process. In SMS case, this sends an SMS verification code to the user.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsMfaEnrollmentWithdraw
tools.description: Revokes one second factor from the enrolled second factors for an account.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsMfaSignInFinalize
tools.description: Verifies the MFA challenge and performs sign-in

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsMfaSignInStart
tools.description: Sends the MFA challenge

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsPasskeyEnrollmentFinalize
tools.description: Finishes enrolling a passkey credential for the user.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsPasskeyEnrollmentStart
tools.description: Step one of the passkey enrollment process. Returns a challenge and parameters for creation of the passkey credential.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsPasskeySignInFinalize
tools.description: Verifies the passkey assertion and signs the user in.

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsPasskeySignInStart
tools.description: Creates and returns the passkey challenge

tools.name: accounts.identitytoolkitAccountsRevokeToken
tools.description: Revokes a user's token from an Identity Provider (IdP). This is done by manually providing an IdP credential, and the token types for revocation. An [API key](https://cloud.google.com/docs/authentication/api-keys) is required in the request in order to identify the Google Cloud project.

tools.name: defaultSupportedIdps.identitytoolkitDefaultSupportedIdpsList
tools.description: List all default supported Idps.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsIdentityPlatformInitializeAuth
tools.description: Initialize Identity Platform for a Cloud project. Identity Platform is an end-to-end authentication system for third-party users to access your apps and services. These could include mobile/web apps, games, APIs and beyond. This is the publicly available variant of EnableIdentityPlatform that is only available to billing-enabled projects.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsCreate
tools.description: Create a tenant. Requires write permission on the Agent project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsDefaultSupportedIdpConfigsCreate
tools.description: Create a default supported Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsDefaultSupportedIdpConfigsList
tools.description: List all default supported Idp configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. An error is returned if the resource does not exist. An empty policy is returned if the resource exists but does not have a policy set on it. Caller must have the right Google IAM permission on the resource.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsInboundSamlConfigsCreate
tools.description: Create an inbound SAML configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsInboundSamlConfigsList
tools.description: List all inbound SAML configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsList
tools.description: List tenants under the given agent project. Requires read permission on the Agent project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsOauthIdpConfigsCreate
tools.description: Create an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsOauthIdpConfigsDelete
tools.description: Delete an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsOauthIdpConfigsGet
tools.description: Retrieve an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsOauthIdpConfigsList
tools.description: List all Oidc Idp configurations for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsOauthIdpConfigsPatch
tools.description: Update an Oidc Idp configuration for an Identity Toolkit project.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy for a resource. If the policy exists, it is replaced. Caller must have the right Google IAM permission on the resource.

tools.name: projects.identitytoolkitProjectsTenantsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns the caller's permissions on a resource. An error is returned if the resource does not exist. A caller is not required to have Google IAM permission to make this request.

tools.name: v2.identitytoolkitGetRecaptchaConfig
tools.description: Gets parameters needed for reCAPTCHA analysis.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
